properties.name: ai.provider.base-url
properties.description: Base URL for the OpenAI-compatible LLM provider (e.g. http://localhost:11434/v1).

properties.name: ai.provider.api-key
properties.description: API key for the LLM provider. Required for production providers.

properties.name: ai.provider.embedding-model
properties.description: Embedding model name. Falls back to ai.provider.model when not set.

properties.name: ai.provider.max-prompt-tokens
properties.description: Approximate token budget for all prompt input content.

properties.name: ai.provider.max-context-tokens
properties.description: Approximate token budget for retrieved or grounding context.
